description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Linux Packages that runs on push to specific branches (master, linux, ffmpeg5) and tags. Use a matrix strategy to build Linux packages in multiple environments (Ubuntu and Fedora) with different architectures (x86_64, arm64) and package types (deb, rpm). For each job, prepare the environment, checkout code and dependencies, create an output directory, set up QEMU if needed, build the package using Docker, and upload the resulting package as a release asset or artifact.
